post_study_work_visa.name: Temporary Residence Permit (APS)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Job must match MBA specialization. Minimum salary threshold applies. Can convert to Talent Passport for 4 years.

language_requirement: Programs taught in English. French language ability beneficial for networking and post-MBA employment.
scholarship_availability: Moderate — INSEAD and HEC offer significant scholarships. Eiffel Excellence Scholarship available for international students.
path_to_pr: Talent Passport (4 years) → long-term residence after 5 years. EU Blue Card option for high-salary roles.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted. INSEAD also accepts EA (Executive Assessment) for experienced candidates.
